AI project failure data quality.text: 4 data gaps that cause enterprise AI projects to fail  qz.com

summary: Four data gaps that can cause enterprise AI projects to fail: data quality, data integration, data governance, and data explainability.
These gaps can lead to poor model performance, lack of trust in AI-driven decisions, and missed business opportunities.
Addressing these gaps requires a data-driven approach, including data cataloging, data lineage, and data quality monitoring.
analysis.pain_point: Data quality, data integration, data governance, and data explainability gaps in enterprise AI projects
